# Continuous build Changelog

- Release tag: `continuous`
- Target commit: `492edf1a66d138e50370f6848c3d60c32e9e2e2c`
- Previous marker: `0e553ff27f3ba7eda893eb2d14bbf10f8dc31507`
- Generated: 2026-07-17T11:02:29.258Z
- Compare: https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/compare/0e553ff27f3ba7eda893eb2d14bbf10f8dc31507...492edf1a66d138e50370f6848c3d60c32e9e2e2c

## Commits

- [23085a7](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/23085a7c9168630547648ff43592748b990039c9) Add BSP biome fragmentation, merging, and interconnection controls (#30). (#200)
- [e063959](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/e06395937b0aff745683a06cfff4507a57377193) Spend residual NPC points on coded upgrade modules; add merchant/sage recipes (#85) (#208)
- [4645b16](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/4645b16d0b4d5d8f191cfa46a56c31c1fd1c4d7a) Carve planned zone gate seams and gate-first connectivity repair (#202). (#209)
- [6c9af80](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/6c9af807fc731cb2c51562ea1d8a6c921de3a96b) Assign room purposes on the room graph: adjacency, depth bands, scarcity (#203). (#210)
- [15aa716](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/15aa7163433cfc4f0ca8c928782b09e7a9f22a83) Classify circulation spine, branches, and chokepoint rooms (#204). (#211)
- [9ea9505](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/9ea95059e752ae2775de89e979591cc3123d7d32) Dig constructed hallways with width profiles for organized/straight maps (#205). (#212)
- [492edf1](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/492edf1a66d138e50370f6848c3d60c32e9e2e2c) Wire geography into danger, treasure, and door security consumers (#206). (#213)
name: Continuous build
